# "Loading... ": Prepare to guide your stout charges to fortune in a world fraught with many perils. You'll begin by creating your world and watching the region's history unfold. Once this process is complete, you can prepare a group and send them out to seek wealth deep in the mountains. As you dig deeper and more citizens take up residence in your outpost, your doings will attract attention, both wanted and unwanted. Deal with challenges as they arise, and you might one day find that your humble settlement has grown to become a Mountainhome, the center of your civilization.
准备引导你勇敢的子民在一个充满危险的世界中寻求财富.
你将从创建你的世界开始,观察该地区的历史展开.
一旦这个过程完成,你可以准备一支队伍并派遣他们深入大山寻找财富.
随着你挖掘得越深,更多的居民在你的前哨站定居,
你的行为将吸引注意力,既有想要的也有不想要的.
应对出现的挑战,有一天你可能会发现你简陋的定居点已经成长为山之心,
你文明的中心.

# "Loading... ": A Dwarven Outpost: You have arrived. After a journey from the Mountainhomes into the forbidding wilderness beyond, your harsh trek has finally ended. Your party of seven is to make an outpost for the glory of all of Viraban.
一座矮人前哨: \a#1C1C1C你们终于抵达了.\a\n\a#1C1C1C历经从群山家园出发, 穿越险恶荒野的漫长旅程, 艰苦的跋涉至此告一段落.\a\n\a#1C1C1C你们这支七人队伍, 将在此建立一座前哨, 为Viraban全体子民赢得荣光.\a

# "Loading... ": There are almost no supplies left, but with stout labor comes sustenance. Whether by bolt, plow or hook, provide for your dwarves. You are expecting a supply caravan just before winter entombs you, but it is Spring now. Enough time to delve secure lodgings, ere the wolves get hungry.
补给所剩无几, 但只要勤勉劳作, 便能获得温饱.
无论使用弩矢、犁铧还是鱼钩, 务必保障矮人们的生计.
你们预计在寒冬将你们封困之前, 会有一支补给商队抵达,
而如今正值春季——尚有充足时间挖掘出安全的居所,
赶在狼群饥肠辘辘之前.

# "Loading... ": Click the surface, move the camera down one level, and click the underground. Reversing the order also works.

# "Loading... ": Now we'll unpause the game and let the miner finish the task. Press Space to unpause or use the highlighted controls at the top of the screen. You should pause regularly starting out.
现在我们将取消游戏暂停, 让矿工完成任务.\n按下\a#13FD65空格键\a即可取消暂停, 或者使用屏幕顶部高亮显示的控制按钮.\n在游戏初期, 建议你经常暂停操作.

# "Loading... ": Let's make a safe place to work. Select Regular Mining mode, to the left of Stair Mining mode.
先清出一块安全的地方吧. 选择\a#E811FF常规挖掘\a模式, 然后点击左边的\a#E811FF掘梯\a模式.

# "Loading... ": Save and return to title menu
保存并返回游戏主菜单

# "Loading... ": Retire the fortress (for the time being)

在新的目录保存(时间线不变)

# "Loading... ": Do this if you want to keep the old save.
Save world and return to title menu
保存世界并返回标题菜单

# "Loading... ": The fort will be saved but
要塞会被保存, 但是您需要收复要塞才能玩.

# "Loading... ": you will need to reclaim the fort to play
Embark with a group to start a settlement.
与一群人一起出发, 开始建立一个定居点.

# "Loading... ": Your citizens will build, mine, craft, trade, fight, and manage as you guide your outpost through its history.
在您引导前哨站发展的过程中,\n您的市民将进行建造、采矿、制作、交易、战斗和管理.

# "Loading... ": purpose of the fortress by issuing orders for
通过向居民下达指令, 设计要塞的形状和用途.

# "Loading... ": Dig a rectangle underground big enough for a large Stockpile and some Workshops. Consider that most Workshops are 3x3 squares. Mining through the stone layers further down may take longer, but it leaves Boulders which are an essential building material.
在地下挖掘一个足够大的空间, 用以建立\a#D79B2D储物点\a和\a#D79B2D工坊\a.
考虑到多数\a#D79B2D工坊\a都是3X3大小的正方形.
在更深的岩层中进一步开采可能需要更多的时间,
但是它留下了\a#FFFF11巨石\a,这是一种必不可少的建筑材料.

# "Loading... ": Later you can consider making a Meeting Area from the Zones menu. Otherwise your citizens will continue to gather by the Wagon outside.
稍后您可以考虑从\a#E811FF区域\a菜单创建一个\a#71BBB0集会区\a.\n否则您的市民将继续在外面的马车旁聚集.

# "Loading... ": The supplies on the wagon are in danger of being carried off by wild creatures! It's time to build a Stockpile underground to unload them. Stockpiles are crucial to moving supplies around your fortress where they are needed.
马车上的补给有被野兽带走的危险!\n是时候在地下建造\a#D79B2D储物堆\a去卸载货物了.\n\a#D79B2D储物堆\a对于搬家是重要的供应给要塞中需要的地方.

# "Loading... ": Stockpiles are placed with the Stockpile button
储物点\a#C0C0C0位于\a\a#E811FF储物堆\a\a#C0C0C0功能键中(已高亮显示), 请点击它.\a

# "Loading... ": Set tree chopping orders.  Select the base of the tree so that the woodcutter can reach it.  Assign a woodcutter to the work detail if necessary.
设定树木砍伐命令.
选择树的底部, 以便樵夫能够到.
如有必要,
指派一名樵夫负责这项工作.

# "Loading... ": Set wall smoothing, engraving, track carving, and fortification orders.
设置墙壁平滑, 雕刻,\n轨道雕刻和防御工事命令.

# "Loading... ": Remove mining, woodcutting, plant gathering, and smoothing orders.
取消开采, 砍伐,\n植物采集及平整命令.

# "Loading... ": Place structures and work areas that require construction materials.
放置需要建筑材料的结构和\n工作区域.

# "Loading... ": Place zones to establish meeting areas, pastures, and more.
放置区域以建立会议区,\n牧场和更多.

# "Loading... ": Establish burrows to organize work and living spaces in larger fortresses.
在较大的堡垒中建立洞穴\n来组织工作和生活空间.

# "Loading... ": Set high and low traffic areas.
设置高流量和低流量区域.

# "Loading... ": Designate items for dumping and melting, claim forbidden items and buildings, and set item visibility.
指定倾倒和熔化的物品,\n要求禁止的物品和建筑,\n并设置物品的可见性.

# "Loading... ": Important and sometimes urgent information is given as alerts on the left side of the screen. There has been one already!
重要且有时是紧急的信息会在屏幕左侧以警报的形式显示.\n已经有一个了!

# "Loading... ": Hover over an alert icon to see the information. Left click on an alert for recentering options, and right click to dismiss an alert.
把鼠标停留在警告标签上来查看详细信息.\n左键单击以打开警报,右键单击以关闭警报.
为商队的到来做好准备 ({d} of {d})

# "Loading... ": You may need supplies before the coming of winter. To trade with the autumn caravan, you must build a Trade Depot from the Build menu.
在冬日到来前你可能需要一些补给. 为了和秋天的商队交易,\n你必须从\a#D79B2D建造\a菜单里建造一个\a#D79B2D贸易站\a.

# "Loading... ": You need something of value to trade. Crafts are an easy way to make a lot of trade goods quickly. Make the appropriate workshop with Workshops -> Crafts.
要交易,你就得有有价值的东西.\n\a#F1E111工艺品\a是最容易且快速制造的大量货物.\n在\a#E811FF工坊\a->\a#E811FF工艺品\a选单中建立合适的工坊.

# "Loading... ": An obvious material to use to make the crafts is rock. If you dig down enough layers you will find a near infinite amount of Boulders of various kinds as well as some Rough Gems if you are lucky.
制作这些工艺品的一种明显的材料是岩石.\n如果你挖的足够深, 那么你就会发现近乎无限的各类\a#FFE111矿石\a,\n如果你幸运的话还有一些\a#FFE111宝石原料\a.

# "Loading... ": Gems can be Cut at the Jeweler's Workshop. Encrust them on Crafts and other items to add even more value.
\a#C0C0C0可以在\a\a#D79B2D珠宝工坊\a\a#12FECF切割\a\a#FFE111宝石\a\a#C0C0C0. 将他们镶嵌在工艺品或者其他物品上来增加更多的价值.\a

屏幕上方的\a#E811FF帮助\a按钮有更多指南. 点击将结束教学.

# "Loading... ": The game is open-ended and you can do whatever you choose.
这个游戏是开放式结局的, 你可以随心所欲.

# "Loading... ": If you'd like a goal, try to join a village hearth and improve your reputation.
如果你实在想要一个目标的话, 去加入一个村庄, 然后提高你的声誉.

# "Loading... ": If you'd like a goal, try to become a barony, then a Mountainhome.
如果你实在想要一个目标的话, 先成为一个领主, 然后建立一个山居.

# "Loading... ": More likely, your dwarves will starve, unless you read the first few guides here!
更有可能的是, 不看前几条说明的话, 你的矮人会挨饿!

# "Loading... ": And remember: Losing is fun, and now it's personal!
且请牢记: \a#13FD65输了才好玩\a, 而且这回只输你一人!

# "Loading... ": Here you can see every Item in the fortress. Click on category headings to collapse and expand them.
